/bin/c++ -fPIC -O3 -DNDEBUG -flto=auto -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/kronos_physics.dir/link.d -shared  -o /home/youssef-ben-letaifa/Desktop/Kro/kronos/native/kronos_physics.cpython-311-x86_64-linux-gnu.so CMakeFiles/kronos_physics.dir/kronos_physics_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kronos_physics.dir/src/vehicle_physics_bindings.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kronos_physics.dir/src/vehicle_physics.cpp.o
